title: The Buster Call Begins
description: The World Government destroys Ohara, and Robin’s tragedy becomes a direct symbol of its cruelty.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Nico Robin, Nico Olvia, Spandam, Professor Clover, Spandine. The World Government destroys Ohara, and Robin’s tragedy becomes a direct symbol of its cruelty.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: You must not allow anyone to escape!!!

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: I'll leave everything else to you.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: HURRY TO THE EVACUATON SHIP, ROBin...!!

dialogue.speaker: Marine soldier
dialogue.text: No... I don't want to be alone....!!

dialogue.speaker: Spandine
dialogue.text: Golden DenderMushi Receiving Line: Silver Dender-Mushi

dialogue.speaker: Professor Clover
dialogue.text: All ships, make ready! Prepare to fire!!!

dialogue.speaker: Ohara scholar
dialogue.text: Put out the fire on the library!!!

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: PLEASE RUN AWAY... DON'T YOU DIE HERE...!!

summary: The World Government destroys Ohara, and Robin’s tragedy becomes a direct symbol of its cruelty.
